html:
{% set company = frappe.get_doc("Company", doc.company) %} {% set employee = frappe.get_doc("Employee", doc.employee) %} {% set letter_head = frappe.get_doc("Letter Head", company.default_letter_head) %}
{% if letter_head.image %}
{% endif %}


Date: {{frappe.utils.formatdate(frappe.utils.nowdate(), "dd/MM/yyyy")}}


UNDERTAKING LETTER


I {{doc.employee_name}}, Employee ID: {{doc.name}}, holder of EID No. {{doc.name}}, working with {{doc.company}}, hereby confirm and acknowledge that I have received all my settlement dues from the company, including my pending salary, air ticket allowance, gratuity, and all other pending financial amounts. I confirm that I have received the full and final settlement in cash, and the {{doc.company}} has completely cleared all my financial matters.



I declare that I do not have any pending claims with the company, and the company is not liable or responsible for anything further. I also undertake that I will not raise any claim, dispute, or objection against the company in the future regarding my employment or settlement.


This undertaking is given by me willingly and without any pressure.


Mode of Payment: {{ doc.salary_mode }}


Name: {{ doc.employee_name }}


Employee Signature:



Thumb Impression:

{% if letter_head.footer_image %}
{% endif %}
name: UNDERTAKING LETTER
